wafv2.webacl.ipsetreferencestatement.Arn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IP set that this statement references.

wafv2.webacl.ipsetreferencestatement.IPS.Description: The configuration for inspecting IP addresses in an HTTP header that you specify, instead of using the IP address that's reported by the web request origin. Commonly, this is the X-Forwarded-For (XFF) header, but you can specify any header name.   If the specified header isn't present in the request, AWS WAF doesn't apply the rule to the web request at all.
